rows.notes: README keeps the narrow-scope guardrails explicit.
README should keep H25 as the current active decision packet while preserving H23 as the frozen scientific state and the older same-endpoint baselines.
STATUS should record H25 as current, preserve H23 as the frozen scientific state, and keep the older same-endpoint baselines explicit.
Publication record README should name the H27 internal driver, the completed H26/R33/H27 packet, and the preserved control ledgers.
The release summary should stay narrow while naming H25 as current, H23 as the frozen scientific state, and frontier work as still conditional.
The manuscript now reads as a section-ordered draft instead of carrying a phase-status preamble.
The current-stage driver should expose the H27 internal driver, the completed H26/R33 downstream packet, and the still-blocked future lanes in one place.
The layout decision log should record release-summary reuse plus the new governance choices.
The completed P8/P9 digests should remain explicit as the baseline for the next plan-mode stage.
